0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","h1",null,{"children":"Knowledge Base"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Build a structured knowledge base from agent interactions and external sources."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Architecture"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart LR\n  S[Sources] -->|import| M[Mnemosyne]\n  M -->|extract| SM[Semantic Memory]\n  SM -->|query| A[Agent]\n  A -->|add| M\n  \n  style SM fill:#f0fdf4,stroke:#16a34a\n"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Importing Sources"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Import from documents\nmem.import_documents(\n  paths=[\"docs/api.md\", \"docs/architecture.md\"],\n  tags=[\"documentation\"],\n)\n\n# Import from URLs\nmem.import_url(\n  url=\"https://api.example.com/docs\",\n  tags=[\"api-reference\"],\n)\n\n# Import from database\nmem.import_sqlite(\n  path=\"legacy-knowledge.db\",\n  mapping={\"question\": \"content\", \"answer\": \"metadata\"},\n)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Querying Knowledge"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Natural language query\nresults = mem.recall(\"How do I authenticate with the API?\")\n\n# Structured query\nfacts = mem.query_facts(\n  predicate=\"requires_authentication\",\n  object=\"true\",\n)\n\n# Hybrid: natural language + structured filter\nresults = mem.recall(\n  \"API authentication\",\n  tags=[\"api-reference\"],\n)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Maintaining Knowledge"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Outdated Information"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Mark as outdated\nmem.update(\n  id=\"mem_old_auth\",\n  tags=[\"api-reference\", \"outdated\"],\n)\n\n# Add replacement\nmem.remember(\n  content=\"API v2 uses OAuth 2.0 with PKCE.\",\n  tags=[\"api-reference\", \"current\"],\n  importance=0.9,\n)\n\n# Query only current\nresults = mem.recall(\n  \"API authentication\",\n  exclude_tags=[\"outdated\"],\n)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Confidence Scoring"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Lower confidence for unverified info\nmem.add_fact(\n  subject=\"API\",\n  predicate=\"rate_limit\",\n  object=\"1000 req/min\",\n  confidence=0.6,  # Unverified\n)\n\n# Higher confidence after verification\nmem.add_fact(\n  subject=\"API\",\n  predicate=\"rate_limit\",\n  object=\"1000 req/min\",\n  confidence=0.95,  # Verified from docs\n)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Knowledge Graph Visualization"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Export graph for visualization\nmem.export_graph(format=\"graphml\", path=\"knowledge.graphml\")\n\n# Or query structure\nstats = mem.graph_stats()\nprint(f\"Entities: {stats.entity_count}\")\nprint(f\"Relations: {stats.edge_count}\")\nprint(f\"Predicates: {stats.predicate_count}\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Use Case: Customer Support"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Initialize with product docs\nmem.import_documents(\n  paths=glob(\"product-docs/**/*.md\"),\n  tags=[\"product-doc\"],\n)\n\n# Agent handles support ticket\ndef handle_ticket(ticket):\n  # Recall relevant docs\n  docs = mem.recall(ticket.description, tags=[\"product-doc\"])\n  \n  # Check for known issues\n  known = mem.query_facts(\n      predicate=\"affects_version\",\n      object=ticket.version,\n  )\n  \n  # Generate response\n  response = generate_response(docs, known, ticket)\n  \n  # Store interaction\n  mem.remember(\n      content=f\"Ticket {ticket.id}: {response.summary}\",\n      tags=[\"support\", f\"ticket-{ticket.id}\"],\n  )\n  \n  return response\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L4",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],"$L5"]}]}]],["$L6"],"$L7"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"PBIa9Xtwu5kJuV8WhdqS_"}
5:["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Knowledge Freshness"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["Schedule regular re-imports of source documents to keep knowledge current. Use ",["$","code",null,{"children":"since"}]," filters to identify potentially outdated information."]}]}]]}]
